calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maureen McFadden appeared by zoom for Carolyn Leong (petitioner).
Norv Leong (nephew) appeared by zoom.

The court stated that this was left on calendar to see if someone would come in with an opposing point of view. Mr. Leong stated that here is to support the petitioner and that he is not to object at all. The Petition for Spousal Property is under submission with the court's intent to grant. The court stated that it will pick, or decline to pick a theory.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Continued To Mar-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
